positive: A stylized, central illustration of a whimsical forest creature, like a glowing owl or a stylized fox, perched on an abstract geometric moss pattern. The style is modern graphic design, incorporating negative space and flat layers of color. High contrast silhouette of the creature against a soft gradient background of deep indigo and emerald green. Minimalist, abstract woodland theme. Intricate yet clean lines, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Vector art aesthetic, hyper-detailed, vibrant colors, centered composition.
